🎯 HOOD — DEALER EM BRIEF (0DTE)  |  Exp: 05-15
🟡 NO TRADE — Lean SLIGHT BULLISH but score only +1/14 — edge too thin.

🧭 Bias: SLIGHT BULLISH (score 1/14)
📍 Spot: $77.03
📐 1σ Range: $76.23 – $77.83
🌀 Gamma Flip: $75.79  (spot above)
📵 Call Wall / Resistance: $80.00
🛡️ Put Wall / Support: $75.00
🎯 Gamma Wall: $75.00
🧨 Range-break triggers
• Up: above $77.83
• Down: below $76.23
🔄 Regime-shift trigger
• Lose gamma flip: $75.79
⚙️ Dealer Regime (0DTE): PIN / RANGE — Spot is still trapped near balance / pin structure. Favor watchlist mode until a clean break confirms direction. Context: inside dealer pin zone.
🧭 Raw Dealer Flow: SUPPRESSING (raw GEX)
🚦 Entry filter: trigger required beyond local structure before treating this as directional.
🏦 Dealer Structure: spot above flip | flip $75.79 | walls $75.00/$80.00
🌡️ Volatility Regime: 🌡️ NORMAL | VIX 17.2 | term normal
🪖 Posture: Reduce size. Wait for a clean break beyond local structure before treating this as directional.

────────────────────────────────
📡 WHAT TO DO — Plain English
🕐 Power Hour: GEX+ = pinning. GEX- = expansion.
⚙️ GEX is POSITIVE — failed moves and mean reversion are MORE LIKELY than continuation.
   → Don't chase breakouts. TRADE THE FAILURES.
📈 Above gamma flip $75.79 (1.24 away) — bullish structure. Dealers buy dips.

🎯 SETUPS TO WATCH:
  IF price drops below $76.23 (range break) → watch for trap. Reclaim = squeeze long. Continuation = real breakdown.
  IF price pops above $77.83 (range break) → watch for trap. Lost = fade short. Holds = real breakout.

⚠️ MOMENTUM RULES (on 5m chart):
  A break is ONLY valid with large 5m candles + continuation on the next candle.
  Small candles breaking a level = likely a TRAP. Wait for the failure.
  If your trade's momentum fades (5m candles getting smaller) → tighten or exit.

— Not financial advice —
